iterate_latest.summary: Client-only UX polish for the FR-01.33 Campaigns lane: collapsible cards (default collapsed, persisted per-slug), collapsible description disclosure, and a height-capped lane so the kanban stays visible. client tsc clean + 1421/1421 vitest + lint clean; F0.5 web E2E tests_run=1 (live built stack, 3 campaigns).

surface_verification.note: Isolated single-process stack (built worktree client via SHIPWRIGHT_STATIC_DIR, temp USERPROFILE), seeded fixture project with 3 campaigns x 6 steps to make expanded cards tall. Verifies default-collapsed + kanban-stays-in-viewport-when-all-expanded + persistence across reload.

behaviors.behavior: Card collapsed by default (header chevron+slug+done/total only; body hidden)
behaviors.evidence: CampaignLaneCard.test.tsx 'is collapsed by default' + E2E PASSED

behaviors.behavior: Card collapse persists per-slug to localStorage (write + read-on-mount + per-slug isolation)
behaviors.evidence: CampaignLaneCard.test.tsx (3 persistence cases) + E2E reload PASSED

behaviors.behavior: Description disclosure closed by default, opens on click, persists per-slug
behaviors.evidence: CampaignLaneCard.test.tsx 'description is behind a disclosure...' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: Expanded-body parity (steps, complete/next/pending icons, copy-launch, disabled states, triage link)
Layout: lane height-capped (max-h-40vh + scroll) so kanban stays in viewport with multiple expanded campaigns
behaviors.evidence: e2e/flows/campaign-lane-collapse.spec.ts (3 campaigns expanded, column-draft.y < viewport, scroll.height <= 0.45vh) PASSED

behaviors.behavior: Expanded state persists across a real-browser reload
